## Testing

<!-- How did you test this? Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] New unit tests added
- [ ] Existing tests pass (`pytest`)
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `ruff format --check .` passes
- [ ] Example scripts still run (`python examples/01_basic_gate.py`)
- [ ] Benchmarks not regressed (`python benchmarks/run.py`)

## Checklist

- [ ] One logical change per PR (split if needed)
- [ ] No new mandatory dependencies (optional extras only)
- [ ] Public API changes documented in `README.md` or `docs/`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Security implications considered (policy bypass, audit integrity)
